description: Phased TTT prefix shortened from 2000 to 1500 documents on top of the PR-1.06957 stack (Fused softcap CE + WD=2.0 + warm-start LoRA + GatedAttn + Polar Express NS). The shorter unscored-warmup prefix lets the LoRA-TTT loop apply updates to ~500 more documents (16166 vs 16000 per phase across the 3 phases), which improves all 3 seeds. 3-seed mean 1.06934 BPB.
methods: Novel (this submission): PHASED_TTT_PREFIX_DOCS reduced 2000 -> 1500. Phased TTT splits 50K val docs into prefix (no LoRA updates, only base model) + suffix (3 phases with LoRA updates + global SGD between phases). Shrinking prefix lets the suffix span 48500 docs instead of 48000, so each of the 3 phases gets ~166 more TTT-updated docs. Improves all 3 seeds by 0.00015 to 0.00039 BPB. All 50K docs are still scored.

Fused softcap CE Triton kernel + TTT_WEIGHT_DECAY=2.0 (PR-1.06957): single streaming kernel computes softcap*tanh + log-sum-exp + per-row CE in fp32, with a backward kernel mirroring the forward symbolically. WD=2.0 stabilizes the kernel's interaction with warm-start LoRA A on seeds 314/1337.
Polar Express NS coefficients (ported from PR #1344): 5 per-iteration minimax-optimal Newton-Schulz tuples replace Muon's single fixed (3.4445,-4.775,2.0315) tuple.
MIN_LR=0.10 + GPTQ_RESERVE_SECONDS=0.5 + VAL_LOSS_EVERY=0 (PR #1787): LR floor + reclaim 15s of training budget.
PR #1768 (this author): per-head GatedAttn + gate mirror in LoRA-TTT path + per-row int8 gate quant.
PR #1767 (this author): alpha/rank LoRA scaling, warm-start LoRA A, alpha=144 on rank 128.
Base: dexhunter PR #1626 (Multi-Phase Global SGD + trimmed GPTQ + MATRIX_LR=0.026), samacqua PR #1530 (VarLen + Fused MLP + doc LoRA TTT), bigbag PR #1493 (triple recurrence + parallel residuals).
hardware_note: Trained on RunPod 8xH100 80GB SXM, PyTorch 2.9.1+cu128, FA3, Triton 3.5.1. Identical SP8192 tokenizer and FineWeb docs as upstream HF willdepueoai/parameter-golf.
